collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (19 total Queries, 16 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT MONTH(violation_date) as month, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Paid' THEN penalty_amount ELSE 0 END) as revenue FROM `violations` WHERE YEAR(violation_date) = '2026' GROUP BY MONTH(violation_date) ORDER BY `month` ASC

SELECT IFNULL(vt.violation_name, violations.violation_type) as violation_type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(violations.penalty_amount) as total_amount FROM `violations` LEFT JOIN `violation_types` `vt` ON `vt`.`id` = `violations`.`violation_type_id` GROUP BY `violations`.`violation_type_id`, `violations`.`violation_type`, `vt`.`violation_name` ORDER BY `count` DESC

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.
This query was called more than once.
This query was called more than once.

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT MONTH(violation_date) as month, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Paid' THEN penalty_amount ELSE 0 END) as revenue FROM `violations` WHERE YEAR(violation_date) = '2026' GROUP BY MONTH(violation_date) ORDER BY `month` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT IFNULL(vt.violation_name, violations.violation_type) as violation_type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(violations.penalty_amount) as total_amount FROM `violations` LEFT JOIN `violation_types` `vt` ON `vt`.`id` = `violations`.`violation_type_id` GROUP BY `violations`.`violation_type_id`, `violations`.`violation_type`, `vt`.`violation_name` ORDER BY `count` DESC
